title: I need help with Monday CRM activities board before tomorrow.
excerpt: I need help with a link issue on the activities board in Monday CRM. I need help before tomorrow 6/25.

posts.author: sfarris (Sam Farris)
posts.cookedHtml: I need help with a link issue on the activities board in Monday CRM. I need help before tomorrow 6/25.

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Sam! Thanks for flagging your use case with us. Hopefully, I’m not too late on this as it is the 25th! When you say “link” are you referring to the Connect Boards Column on the “Activities” board, or are you referring to something else?

Any visual context you can share to walk us through the issue would be great!
